allow:
Bash(# Copy scaffold files to HR directory \(excluding .git, node_modules, .next\)
cp /tmp/hr-scaffold/.gitignore /c/Users/ntont/Desktop/HR/
cp /tmp/hr-scaffold/eslint.config.mjs /c/Users/ntont/Desktop/HR/
cp /tmp/hr-scaffold/next.config.ts /c/Users/ntont/Desktop/HR/
cp /tmp/hr-scaffold/next-env.d.ts /c/Users/ntont/Desktop/HR/
cp /tmp/hr-scaffold/package.json /c/Users/ntont/Desktop/HR/
cp /tmp/hr-scaffold/pnpm-lock.yaml /c/Users/ntont/Desktop/HR/
cp /tmp/hr-scaffold/postcss.config.mjs /c/Users/ntont/Desktop/HR/
cp /tmp/hr-scaffold/tsconfig.json /c/Users/ntont/Desktop/HR/
cp -r /tmp/hr-scaffold/public /c/Users/ntont/Desktop/HR/

# Move src/app/ to app/ \(no src dir\)
mkdir -p /c/Users/ntont/Desktop/HR/app
cp -r /tmp/hr-scaffold/src/app/* /c/Users/ntont/Desktop/HR/app/)

Bash(cat > /c/Users/ntont/Desktop/HR/.env.local << 'EOF'
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=
OPENAI_API_KEY=
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://localhost:3000
ALLOWED_EMAIL_DOMAIN=
HR_MANAGER_EMAILS=
RATE_LIMIT_CHAT_PER_MINUTE=20
RATE_LIMIT_UPLOAD_PER_HOUR=50
EOF
echo "Created .env.local")
